Analyze requirements.name: Analyze requirements
Analyze requirements.description: Break down the requirements into software, electronics, and mechanical components

steps.input: JARVIS, I want to design a small autonomous robot that can detect and collect objects.  Create a complete engineering plan.  Requirements: - Use ESP32 as the controller - Two DC motors for movement - Servo-based grabbing arm - Battery powered - PCB should be designed instead of using loose wires - 3D printed chassis - Include software, electronics, and mechanical design  Your tasks: 1. Analyze requirements. 2. Create a mission plan. 3. Assign the correct Kings and Worker Cards. 4. Recommend CAD software. 5. Design the electronics architecture. 6. Create a PCB design plan. 7. Create the firmware architecture. 8. Create a bill of materials. 9. Identify risks. 10. Store this project as a long-term engineering workspace.  Do not immediately answer. First create the execution DAG and show the agent delegation process.
